_comment: Tracks vendored frontend libraries committed to PingCastleCommon/Template/. These are minified files embedded as GZip resources in the .NET assembly — they cannot be tracked by Dependabot. Review and update manually when upgrading. Check release pages and CDN changelogs for each library.

libraries.name: jQuery
libraries.notes: 3.3.1 has known XSS CVEs (CVE-2019-11358, CVE-2020-11022, CVE-2020-11023). Upgrade to 3.7.x. API is backwards-compatible within 3.x.

libraries.name: Bootstrap
libraries.notes: Must be upgraded alongside Popper.js. Latest stable: 5.3.x.

libraries.name: Popper.js
libraries.notes: Required by Bootstrap 5. Must be kept aligned with Bootstrap version.

libraries.name: Bootstrap Table
libraries.notes: bootstrap-table-export must match bootstrap-table version exactly.

libraries.name: tableExport.jquery.plugin
libraries.notes: Used as the export backend for Bootstrap Table export plugin.

libraries.name: Font Awesome
libraries.notes: CSS icon library. Drop-in upgrade within 6.x. Latest: 6.7.x.

libraries.name: vis.js
libraries.notes: ABANDONED — last release 2017. The project split into vis-network, vis-timeline, vis-data. PingCastle uses the Network graph component. Migration to vis-network 9.x requires rewriting ReportCompromiseGraph.js. Deferred — tracked separately.

review_cadence: Check on each release or at minimum quarterly
